ItacAcademyItem.Name: Alati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Maylender dates the foundation of the Alati Academy to 1606 (Vol. I, p. 110). According to Mauritio di Gregorio the Alati Academy was founded in the XVIth century. See Mauritio di Gregorio, Condottiere de` Predicatori, Venice, 1627, p. 6.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
